Scooby-Doo: Scooby Trap

Single HTML wrapper with the game files embedded inside it.

Score: 0 Streak: 0 Question: 0 / 15 Next question: Waiting for Space

The game could not start automatically. This wrapper uses Ruffle from its public CDN, so the first load needs internet access. After that, all game assets are already embedded in this HTML file.

Start Quiz Overlay

The quiz timer begins when you press the space bar or click Start Quiz. A question will appear every 15 seconds. Correct answers are worth +50, and each correct answer in a streak adds another +10 streak bonus.

When a question appears, answer it and click Continue to return to the game.
